name: Atlas Brew Works & Andy's Pizza Navy Yard

notes: The location-specific primary Andy's Pizza Toast sections contain 34 current food rows: 9 appetizers, 22 pizza rows, and 3 extra sauces.
All 39 frozen rows were reconciled exactly once; the frozen record includes five operational or duplicate rows and one Atlas beverage row while omitting Side of Ranch.
The exact-location restaurant-issued menu and current Navy Yard Toast surface reconcile to 38 current food rows across four consumer sections.

All 39 frozen rows were reconciled exactly once; the frozen record contains three operational duplicates and one Atlas beverage row, uses two malformed operational names, and omits Dairy Free Margherita, 8 Makes a Pie, and Side of Ranch.
Post-repair recheck reconciled the exact-location restaurant-issued menu with the current linked Toast surface into 38 unique food products across four sections.
Frozen reconciliation: 30 exact verified, 3 exact accurately unavailable, 1 variant verified, 2 variants accurately unavailable, 2 stale operational duplicates, and 1 beverage artifact.
The restaurant-issued Andy's menu labels Cheese as dairy and wheat; frozen Slice Cheese and Whole Cheese contain only milk.
Other retained positive claims are limited to direct ingredient wording from current restaurant-authored descriptions; no negative or cross-contact conclusion is inferred.

The exact-location restaurant-issued menu applies a universal 72-hour sourdough crust description to all pizza rows and separately labels Cheese as dairy and wheat; the frozen record omits wheat/gluten throughout the pizza menu.
All 24 pizza rows retain wheat and gluten from the exact-location universal sourdough crust statement; direct item wording supplies milk or tree-nut where applicable.
32 current items have fixed direct positive disclosures and 6 are accurately unavailable; no negative or cross-contact claim is inferred.
The Toast extraction flattened Appetizers, Pizza, and Extra Sauce into Pizza and admitted tilde-suffixed rows from the separate Third Party - for Checkmate operational section.
Underberg Bitters belongs to Atlas Beverages & Merchandise rather than the food-focused Andy's Pizza record.
The Toast extraction flattened the restaurant-issued menu sections into Pizza and admitted tilde-suffixed rows from the separate Third Party - for Checkmate operational section.
The scoped repair restores restaurant-issued sections, excludes the Checkmate operational duplicates and Atlas beverage, and includes every product published by either current exact-location surface.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Restaurant-issued Atlas page verified the Navy Yard identity, address, and co-located Andy's Pizza operation.
Restaurant-issued Andy's menu provided current menu descriptions and the direct dairy/wheat label on Cheese.
Restaurant-linked Toast menu provided the current Navy Yard product and section boundary and exposed the separate operational Checkmate section.
Targeted research located current restaurant-issued and location-specific sources; no comprehensive allergen matrix or cross-contact policy was located.
No material archived allergen source was needed because current primary sources were accessible.
Third-party mirror was located but not used for menu or allergen authority.

findings.summary: Slice Cheese and Whole Cheese omitted the restaurant-issued wheat disclosure.
findings.resolution: Applied wheat and gluten to both Cheese rows as part of the universal pizza-crust repair.

findings.summary: The frozen record contained operational duplicates, malformed names, and current-location omissions.
findings.resolution: Removed three duplicate operational rows, normalized Fried Cauliflower and Old Bay Fries, and restored Dairy Free Margherita and 8 Makes a Pie.

findings.summary: The frozen extraction flattened food sections, omitted Side of Ranch, and misclassified Underberg Bitters as pizza.
findings.resolution: Restored four consumer sections, added Side of Ranch, and removed the beverage from the food-focused record.

findings.summary: Frozen pizza rows omitted the exact-location universal sourdough crust's wheat/gluten disclosure.
findings.resolution: Applied wheat and gluten to all 24 current pizza rows while retaining only directly supported additional signals.

repairs.summary: Reconciled and verified the complete 38-item exact-location Atlas Navy Yard/Andy's food menu and its conservative direct-positive allergen data.
verificationCommands: node --test --test-name-pattern='Atlas and Andy.s reconciles the current Navy Yard menu' scripts/restaurant-pipeline.test.mjs

notes: Terra research: gpt-5.6-terra low; Sol adjudication: gpt-5.6-sol medium.
Sol upheld discrepancy_found but rejected characterizing the underlying appetizer concepts as retired; the defect is operational-section contamination.
Focused Atlas/Andy's regression passed with 38 unique products, 32 direct positive disclosures, and 6 accurately unavailable results.
Generated recheck packet from src/data/generated/restaurants.generated.json after the scoped restaurant repair.
Post-repair current menu: 38 unique food products; 32 direct positive disclosures; 6 accurately unavailable results.
